---
title: "Geo Viz"
---

# Librerías
```{python}
import pandas as pd
import geopandas as gpd
import altair as alt
```

# Cargar DS
```{python}
url = "https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/110m/cultural/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip"

gdf_ne = gpd.read_file(url)
gdf_ne = gdf_ne[["NAME","CONTINENT","POP_EST","geometry"]]
gdf_ne

```

# Visualización del mapa

```{python}
alt.Chart(gdf_ne).mark_geoshape().project(
    type='mercator'
)
```

## Focus y filter

```{python}
alt.Chart(gdf_ne).mark_geoshape().project(
    scale=200,
    translate=[320,70]
)
```

## Pintado y bordes

```{python}
alt.Chart(gdf_ne).mark_geoshape(
    fill='lightgray',
    stroke = 'white'
).project(
    scale=200,
    translate=[320,70]
)
```

## Mapa de puntos

```{python}

gdf_sel = gdf_ne.query("CONTINENT == 'South America'")

basemap = alt.Chart(gdf_sel).mark_geoshape(
    fill='lightgray',
    stroke = 'white'
)

bubbles = alt.Chart(gdf_sel).transform_calculate(
    centroid = alt.expr.geoCentroid(None, alt.datum)
).mark_circle().encode(
    longitude='centroid[0]:Q',
    latitude='centroid[1]:Q',
    size='POP_EST'
)

basemap + bubbles

```

## Mapa Coroplético

```{python}

alt.Chart(gdf_sel).mark_geoshape().encode(
    color='POP_EST',
    tooltip=[
        'POP_EST'
    ]
)

```

# Enlazar 2 archivos: DS y Geopandas

```{python}
from vega_datasets import data

gdf_us_counties = alt.topo_feature(data.us_10m.url, "counties")
gdf_us_counties

```

```{python}

df_us_unemp = data.unemployment()
df_us_unemp
```

## Merge de los 2 DS: geojson + df data.unemployment

```{python}

alt.Chart(gdf_us_counties).mark_geoshape().transform_lookup(
    lookup='id',
    from_=alt.LookupData(data=df_us_unemp, key='id', fields=['rate'])
).encode(
    alt.Color('rate:Q')
).project(
    type='albersUsa'
)

```

# Repeat map

```{python}

states = alt.topo_feature(data.us_10m.url, 'states')

source = data.population_engineers_hurricanes.url
variable_list = ['population','engineers','hurricanes']


alt.Chart(states).mark_geoshape().encode(
    alt.Color(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative')
).transform_lookup(
    lookup='id',
    from_=alt.LookupData(data=source, key='id', fields=variable_list)
).project(
    type='albersUsa'
).repeat(
    row=variable_list
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent'
)

```

# Casos de asma en USA

```{python}

state_pop = pd.read_csv('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/erickedu85/dataset/master/us_population_coordinates_asthma-cases.csv')
state_pop
```

## Mapa de puntos

```{python}

us_map = alt.Chart(states).mark_geoshape(
    stroke='white',
    fill='lightgray'
).project(
    type='albersUsa'
)


points = alt.Chart(state_pop).mark_circle().encode(
    longitude='longitude:Q',
    latitude='latitude:Q',
    size='number_of_asthma_cases:Q'
)

us_map + points
```

## Derivar otra variable: asthma_cases_per_capita

```{python}
state_pop['asthma_cases_per_capita'] = state_pop['number_of_asthma_cases']/state_pop['population']
state_pop


us_map + points.encode(
    size='asthma_cases_per_capita:Q'
)

```

## Generar el archivo GeoJSON

```{python}
import geopandas as gdp
url = "https://naciscdn.org/naturalearth/110m/cultural/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.zip"

gdf_ne = gpd.read_file(url)
gdf_ne.to_file("paises.geojson", driver="GeoJSON")

```
